description_long: This is a modern sectional sofa with a left-facing chaise lounge, featuring clean lines and a minimalist design. The sofa is upholstered in a uniform, dark gray fabric that appears smooth and tightly fitted over the frame. The seat consists of two main cushions, while the chaise section extends seamlessly from the left side, providing ample lounging space. The backrest is straight, continuous, and of medium height, with no visible tufting or decorative stitching. Both armrests are straight, boxy, and padded, matching the overall geometric aesthetic of the piece. The sofa stands on five short, block-style legs that are slightly recessed and finished in black, giving it a stable and contemporary appearance.
description: A modern, dark gray sectional sofa with a left-facing chaise, straight padded armrests, and a continuous backrest. The upholstery is smooth and the sofa stands on short, block-style black legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the sofa, the left-facing chaise, and both straight armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the length of the chaise and the straight profile of the armrest and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, straight backrest and the sofa's overall rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the main seating area, the right armrest, and the end of the chaise section.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two main seat cushions and a single chaise cushion, all attached and uniform in size, with a continuous, attached backrest cushion.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests at both ends, matching the height of the seat and backrest, with a padded, minimalist design and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Five short, block-style legs positioned at the corners and center, finished in black, slightly recessed and visually unobtrusive.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with no segmentation or tufting, and an attached cushion structure.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible pattern, tufting, or decorative stitching.
